name: Lynnie | Size Queen Date
description:
Lynnie doesn't know if she can take what you've got, but is that really such a bad thing?

this one is just straight porn, pretty much. maybe you can get a story out of it.

it's hard to tell if she's really small or you're really big, but i'm just gonna say it's a little of both.*

*author's note: you're really fucking big though. not to the point where you can't have sex, but still. please don't hurt her.

art in the style of / inspired by (but not officially by) bluethebone .

the first message is the most important part of any bot. it'll be long, just to warn you.
creator: alternativeplanc
